about_the_product.description: You can pack high performance into a smaller footprint with this SFF-Ready Enthusiast GeForce card. Look for cases that are compatible with SFF-Ready Enthusiast GeForce Cards to get a sure fit and streamline your PC build The Prime GeForce RTX 5080 features a 2.5 slot design with a carefully arranged layout for the shroud, heatsink and heat pipes to let the three Axial-tech fans leverage chassis side-panel ventilation and deliver optimal thermal performance. Three tried-and-true Axial-tech fans feature a smaller hub that facilitates longer blades and a barrier ring to increase downward air pressure for lower temperatures, less noise and higher performance. Different bearing types have unique pros and cons. Dual-ball bearings excel at durability and can last up to twice as long as sleeve bearing designs. All three fans come to a standstill when GPU temperatures are below 50 Celsius, letting you play less demanding games or perform light tasks in relative silence. Fans start up again when temperatures are over 55 C, establishing a speed curve that balances performance and acoustics for work or play.

items.snippet: In the end it is a quiet well performing card. I still don't trust Asus, or really like them too much. However, I will say this card has been serving me well

Fast, quiet and stays even cooler. For basic tasks, the fans won't kick on. Even in my compact Jonsplus i100 Pro.

In the end it is a quiet well performing card
is understated. The quality of the build and performance is not disputed. Quiet operation in performance mode. I will definitely buy again for another build
And it tends to run cooler than other RTX models. Also, the form factor is 2-slot which better in my cases. Definitely would go with ASUS Prime 5080 again.
This card is great! Gaming in 4k looks amazing. Bestbuy delivered quickly and without issue.
Works great! Can have Cyberpunk cranked to the limit with ray tracing. Looks amazing with smooth frames.
Sturdy build and works perfect. Enjoy the minimalistic look overall and it’s a great value for the money if you don’t need RGB lighting.

user_reviews.title: It suits my needs!
user_reviews.text: The Asus Prime is a powerful device and runs perfectly well. The aesthetics of the graphics card are welcomed, not too flashy, not too boring. Just right for my liking. Some boost clocks may be better on other 5080 brand cards, but I like what I have and it works for me. It runs what I play on my 4k oled 240hz monitor (not bragging) with ease, way better than my 4080s I traded for it and I loved that card as well. I just wanted the additional features that came with the new 5000 series cards. For gaming it works, its not a 5090, but then again I'm not an enthusiast. Just a casual gamer! I like the Asus Prime despite what others say about it. The overclock is good. I have mine set between 390-400 core clock and 1500-2000 memory, without touching voltage and it runs stable. My temps are maxed at 71-72c. Clock speeds between 3180-3200mhz max. I mess around a little. Gameplay buttery smooth, however as with all games you still have to play around with the settings to get the best feel no matter the graphics card! Optimized games also play a major role and how the gameplay will be as well. But, all-in-all I'm happy with my purchase of the Asus Prime gpu 16gbs it suits my needs for now.

user_reviews.title: ASUS, per usual, did not disappoint with this GPU
user_reviews.text: I’ve had the graphics card in my PC for a few day now and have not run into a single problem. From installation to loading up my first game the process was incredibly easy and so far I haven’t ran into a single issue. The fans on this GPU are very quiet, my case and radiator fans are much louder. I have been able to run almost every game I have loaded up on max graphics. I would definitely buy another ASUS GPU in the near future

user_reviews.title: 10/10 incredible card!
user_reviews.text: Incredible Beautiful card!! Upgraded from a 3090. Very silent. Runs amazing. Low temps. Very happy with my purchase. 100% satisfied!! ASUS Quality as always!!

user_reviews.title: Prime 5080 - Great Performance and Very Quiet
user_reviews.text: Got this before the prices went jumped again, Prime 5080 runs very cool and quiet for its product tier and delivers great performance for the money, very solid card

user_reviews.title: Another 5080
user_reviews.text:
Was able to purchase the day before Christmas at MSRP $999. Although it’s not my preferred look for a build, I was not going to pay over MSRP for a card that barely improves over 4080 Super.

My old Build included an EVGA 3080 and 8700K but started to show its age in modern titles such as BF6 if I wanted all the setting maxed without DLSS.

Is it overpriced, yes, but it’s also the best consumer grade card unless you want to spend $2,000 or more.

New build paired with 9800X3D Runs BF6 Overkill settings, no DLSS or FG at 3440 x 1440 at 130 fps.

Opted not to wait for super due to rumors of cancellation.

If you can afford it then why not, but if you can’t, opt for 5070ti or 9700xt @ MSRP only.

user_reviews.title: AI Gaming
user_reviews.text: Upgraded from an RTX 3080 FE to the 5080, and the difference is massive. Frame rates are significantly higher, ray tracing performance is way better, and DLSS 4.0 makes everything smoother without sacrificing quality. Temps are solid, and power efficiency seems improved too. If you’re coming from a 30-series card, this is a serious upgrade—definitely worth it!
